news.summary: For the 32nd year in a row, TransPerfect has experienced annual growth, with AI solution sales being the primary driving force. The company, recognized as the leading provider of language and AI solutions for worldwide business, disclosed a total revenue of $1.23 billion for 2024. This marks a growth of around $35 million compared to the previous year, demonstrating the continuing success and expansion of TransPerfect's services in the global market.
news.headline: TransPerfect's billed revenues rose 3% in 2024 to $1.23 billion, marking its 32nd year of growth driven by AI solution sales.

news.summary: A leading API security company, Wallarm, has appointed a new President and Global Chief Revenue Officer to bolster their team for future expansion. Headquartered in San Francisco, the company shared impressive outcomes from the year 2024, indicating robust growth and retention rates. These achievements were primarily driven by the increasing demand for their real-time API and AI security solutions, showcasing the significance of their services.
news.headline: Wallarm closed 2024 with 134% growth in enterprise accounts, adding new executives to support future expansion.

news.summary: Claroty, a cyber-physical systems (CPS) protection company, has expanded its investments and initiatives in the U.S. public sector. The company has focused on mitigating Foreign Ownership, Control, or Influence (FOCI) while also pursuing FedRAMP High certification. On April 10, 2025, Claroty announced the appointment of Jen to lead these efforts. This signifies the company's commitment to enhancing cybersecurity in critical infrastructure.
news.headline: Claroty appoints retired U.S. Air Force Colonel Jen Sovada as GM to boost public sector efforts, focusing on FOCI mitigation and FedRAMP High.

news.summary: A new AI-powered virtual assistant designed for patients and physicians has significantly boosted conversion rates by as much as 40%. The innovative technology, known as GenAI, leverages computer vision models to enhance user experience. Developed by Bliss Aesthetics ("Bliss"), a platform specializing in cosmetic enhancement, this cutting-edge tool marks a significant advancement. Operating from locations in New York and Tel Aviv, Israel, the AI concierge demonstrates remarkable efficiency in driving conversions. The platform's ability to harness AI and computer vision has proven instrumental in the success of Bliss Aesthetics, showcasing a promising future for AI integration in healthcare services.
news.headline: Bliss Aesthetics raises $17.5M seed funding to launch AI platform connecting patients with plastic surgeons.

news.summary: This spring, Johnnie Walker is rewarding golfers who achieve a hole-in-one by presenting them with a limited edition Blue Label Sunday Golf Bag in partnership with Devereux Golf. The initiative, which began in 1926, commemorates Johnnie Walker Blended Scotch Whisky and its tradition of celebrating golf successes. The exclusive promotion is set to honor and provide recognition to golfers who achieve this impressive feat.
news.headline: Johnnie Walker brings back 99-year-old tradition w/ 'Blue-in-One' challenge, rewarding hole-in-one golfers with Blue Label bag.
BoE Breeden: It is very unclear what overall landscape will be for tariffs in medium term.
BoE Breeden: The world has moved on significantly since March MPC meeting.

news.summary: ColorTokens Inc. has announced that CP Gurnani, the ex-CEO and MD of Tech Mahindra and co-founder of AIonOS, has joined their Advisory Board. Gurnani brings with him 40 years of experience in enterprise transformation and innovation. The company is based in San Jose, California and aims to advance its breach-ready mission. The announcement was made on April 10, 2025, indicating a significant step forward in leveraging Gurnani's expertise to enhance ColorTokens' strategic direction.
news.headline: CP Gurnani joins ColorTokens' Advisory Board, with 40 years of experience, to advance breach-ready mission.

news.summary: PioCreat 3D, a leading company specializing in advanced 3D printing technology, is excited to share its involvement in Rapid + TCT 2025, the top additive manufacturing exhibition in North America. Attendees are invited to meet the PioCreat 3D team at Booth #1501 during the event running from April 8th to April 10th, 2025.
news.headline: PioCreat 3D to showcase 3D printing innovations at Rapid + TCT 2025 in North America, booth #1501, April 8–10.

news.summary: The AirStyle Pro by Dreame, a versatile 7-in-1 styling tool for salon-quality results, is making its debut at the GUESS Compound during weekend 1 (April 10-14, 2025) of COACHELLA, one of the most famous music festivals globally. This innovative product is revolutionizing hair styling just in time for the festival season.
news.headline: Dreame introduces 7-in-1 AirStyle Pro Hair Dryer at COACHELLA, Calif., during weekend 1, April 10-14, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report titled "United States Grain Analysis Market, By Region, Competition, Forecast and Opportunities, 2019-2029F" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. The United States Grain Analysis Market, valued at USD 484.22 Million in 2023, is projected to reach USD 671.03 Million by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.76%. This analysis provides valuable insights into the history, formation processes, and properties of the material. In the field of geology, grain size analysis plays a crucial role in aiding various processes.
news.headline: US grain analysis market to reach $671.03 Mn by 2029, with a CAGR of 5.76%, up from $484.22 Mn in 2023 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: A recent study conducted in the field and laboratory has quantified the effectiveness of stow systems in mitigating extreme weather, particularly hail, at solar plants. GroundWork Renewables, Inc. from Sand City, California was acknowledged for their efforts at the 2025 National Renewable Energy Laboratory (NREL). The study provides valuable data to support strategies for mitigating the impacts of extreme weather on solar plants. This research brings attention to the critical role stow systems play in safeguarding solar infrastructure.
news.headline: GroundWork Renewables, Inc. honored for hail impact research at PVRW 2025. Study quantifies solar plant's stow effectiveness.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Holtzman Vogel Baran Torchinsky and Josefiak PLLC, a prominent law firm focusing on political law, regulatory law, and litigation, revealed it is extending its operations to Nashville, Tennessee. This move marks a significant milestone for Holtzman Vogel as it enters the Nashville market to enhance its services.
news.headline: Law firm Holtzman Vogel expands into Tennessee by hiring former TN Attorney General Chief of Staff.

news.summary: Mark Pryor, Chairman and CEO of The Seam, based in Memphis, Tennessee, has recently been named to the Agribusiness Industry Council of the Federal Reserve Bank located in St. Louis. This council plays a crucial role in providing insights and guidance on the agricultural sector's economic trends and challenges. Pryor’s appointment underscores his expertise and leadership in the industry, highlighting his influence in shaping policies and decisions affecting the agribusiness sector. This collaboration between Pryor and the Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis signifies a significant step towards enhancing the industry's representation and strategic planning.
news.headline: Mark Pryor from The Seam named to St. Louis Fed's Agribusiness Industry Council (MEMPHIS, Tenn: BUSINESS WIRE)

news.summary: Check out the newest selection of adorable phone cases featuring bright spring florals from OtterBox in Fort Collins, Colorado. Released on April 10, 2025, these cases capture the essence of spring as days get longer and winter becomes a thing of the past. OtterBox's latest line of floral phone cases, "Confetti of Spring," offers a variety of designs to choose from. Dive into the world of vibrant colors and blooming flowers with these cases that are sure to bring a touch of spring to your phone.
news.headline: OtterBox launches 'Confetti of Blossoms' collection of cute phone cases with vibrant spring florals - PRNewswire, FORT COLLINS, Colo., April 10, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on April 10, 2025, Carrum Health was selected by the State of Tennessee to provide their value-based Centers of Excellence network. This decision follows similar partnerships with the state governments of Nevada, Maine, and various other public sector employers. Carrum Health is recognized as a top provider in value-based COE solutions, and the State of Tennessee's decision reaffirms this. This collaboration will benefit employees and members in Tennessee by offering high-quality care through Carrum Health's network.
news.headline: Tennessee partners with Carrum Health to enhance specialty care for state employees, joining Nevada and Maine.
BoE Breeden: I have seen substantial progress on disinflation.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City, TACORI, a renowned fine jewelry brand, has teamed up with J. Brooks Jewelers to introduce TACORI engagement rings and wedding bands in Utah. J. Brooks Jewelers, a well-known family-owned jeweler in Salt Lake City, is recognized for its expert female stylists, top-notch service, and distinctive fine jewelry collections. This luxury jeweler is now offering the newest TACORI bridal collection to customers in the state of Utah.
news.headline: TACORI Bridal Jewelry now at J. Brooks Jewelers in Utah; offering engagement rings and wedding bands in boutique setting.

news.summary: A report on "The Grief Tax" was unveiled by Empathy, a prominent platform merging technology and human support to revolutionize how individuals face challenging life events. This marks their fourth annual research release. The report delves into the genuine expenses of loss, encompassing financial costs, time investments, and repercussions on well-being, connections, and professions. It highlights variations in these impacts across different age groups, underscoring how one's involvement and position in the ordeal can influence outcomes.
news.headline: Empathy report reveals detrimental effects of loss on health, finances, and relationships, highlighting differences across generations.

news.summary: In Greensboro, N.C., the renowned denim brand Wrangler® has partnered with Sony Pictures Consumer Products for a remarkable collaboration tied to the latest season of the popular HBO® series, The Last of Us. This collaboration merges the brand's rugged Americana style with the timeless essence of the show, which draws inspiration from the well-known video game series created by Naughty Dog for PlayStation® consoles. The collection is inspired by the adventures of Joel, Ellie, and the tenacious survivors within The Last of Us. This much-awaited collaboration brings together elements of the show with a distinctive Americana flair.
news.headline: Wrangler collaborates with Sony Pictures for Last of Us HBO series, blending rugged style with show's spirit.

news.summary: In Chicago, Cincinnati Children’s and GE HealthCare are joining forces to create a strategic research program aimed at enhancing pediatric care delivery. This collaboration will focus on driving clinical and technical research across various modalities such as MRI, ultrasound, MI, and CT. This initiative will lead to the establishment of the inaugural pediatric Care Innovation Hub in the country. This innovative partnership between the two entities, GE HealthCare and Cincinnati Children’s, will pave the way for advancements in pediatric healthcare.
news.headline: Cincinnati Children’s and GE HealthCare partner for pediatric imaging innovation; new program to focus on MRI, ultrasound, MI and CT.

news.summary: In New York, National CineMedia (NASDAQ: NCMI) (NCM), a major cinema advertising platform in the US and the US representative of the Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity, unveiled the champions of the 2025 US Young Lions contest. The noteworthy event saw a remarkable turnout, with more than 500 teams consisting of budding advertising, marketing, and communications experts entering the competition. The total number of entries amounted to 359, showcasing a substantial surge of close to 10% compared to the previous year. Following intense competition, the victorious teams were finally revealed.
news.headline: National CineMedia declares 2025 US Young Lions Contest champions; 500 teams with 359 entries, 10% increase from 2024.

news.summary: New York-based Establishment Labs Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: ESTA), a medical technology firm focused on enhancing women's health, particularly in breast aesthetics and reconstruction, shared their initial sales figures for the first quarter of 2025. The company reported an estimated preliminary unaudited revenue of around $41.4 million during this period. Additionally, Establishment Labs disclosed plans to hold an analyst and investor gathering in New York City on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: Establishment Labs announces $41.4 million in preliminary Q1 2025 sales, plans June 12 investor event in NYC.

news.summary: The sudden surge of Bitcoin (BTC) breaking above $80,000 has left traders surprised, but its sustainability is being questioned. Noted analyst Capo of Crypto cautioned in a recent post that despite the immediate gains, a bleak outlook looms. Capo, who has shifted focus to short-term trading, emphasizes on the broader perspective which points towards impending challenges. The massive money printing in 2020 merely postponed an expected downturn, leading to a reduction in liquidity due to quantitative tightening and steep interest rates. Despite market highs, Capo remains skeptical about the prolonged success. For more details, refer to the full report accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin surpasses $80,000 amid doubts of sustainability, risk of bear market in September. Analyst warns of possible collapse due to monetary tightening and liquidity drain.

news.summary: Metrie, a company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has expanded its distribution of interior doors. Previously distributing only in Phoenix and Denver, they have now added the Midwest and Florida markets to their distribution network. This move allows them to reach a larger customer base across regions in the United States.
news.headline: Metrie® expands interior door distribution to Midwest and Florida markets from Phoenix and Denver.
BoE Breeden: The latest developments have a material impact on economic outlook and risks.

news.summary: A new outpatient center in North Phoenix is set to cater to the increasing need for youth mental health support. Horizon Recovery, the top provider of adolescent mental health and addiction recovery services in Arizona, revealed on April 10, 2025, its intention to open the facility. The center aims to address the growing demand for such services among youths. Additionally, it will provide summer programs to support mental health needs in the community.
news.headline: Horizon Recovery to open 7th AZ location in North Phoenix, addressing escalating youth mental health support needs.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 11, 2025, Damon Inc. (NASDAQ: DMN), a company specializing in creating electric motorcycles and other personal mobility products, aims to revolutionize the personal mobility industry through innovation, data analysis, and strategic planning.
news.headline: Damon Inc. will present at Planet Microcap Showcase in Vegas on April 23 at 3:00pm PT. Ticker: DMN.

news.summary: In April 10, 2025, BackBox proudly revealed being selected as a finalist in the distinguished 2025 SC Awards. The company earned recognition in the Best Customer Service division, showcasing its dedication to quality and innovation in cybersecurity. This achievement highlights BackBox's leadership in the industry, emphasizing their commitment to providing top-notch services to customers.
news.headline: BackBox named finalist in 2025 SC Awards for Best Customer Service, highlighting excellence in cybersecurity.

news.summary: In Boston on April 10, 2025, illumicell AI, a techmed startup established by Harvard-trained physician Michel Bielecki, former McKinsey consultant Jeyla Sadikova, and rocket engineer Loup Cordey, secured $2 million in pre-seed funding. The purpose of this funding is to hasten the progress of creating the initial portable "lab..."
news.headline: illumicell AI, a techmed startup founded by 3 professionals, raises $2M for male fertility diagnostics platform.

news.summary: SATELLAI, a leading company in AI-integrated pet technology, has introduced the groundbreaking SATELLAI Collar in SHENZHEN, China, on April 10, 2025. This innovative collar sets a new standard in GPS tracking, virtual fencing, and AI-driven pet care. The SATELLAI Collar represents the latest advancement in pet care products, offering pet owners advanced features for monitoring and caring for their pets. This launch marks a significant milestone in pet technology, as the collar incorporates cutting-edge technology to enhance pet safety and well-being.
news.headline: SATELLAI launches the world's most connected smart dog collar with global coverage and AI-powered monitoring, sets new GPS tracking standard.

news.summary: Guinness has launched a new advertising campaign featuring authentic groups of friends who bond over their common interests and a love for Guinness. The campaign, titled "A Lovely Day," showcases real stories of camaraderie and connection. This initiative spans across all fifty states, emphasizing the message that being with your closest companions makes every day special. By highlighting shared passions and the joy of spending time together over pints of Guinness, the campaign aims to celebrate friendship and togetherness.
news.headline: Guinness launches new ad campaign showcasing real groups of friends coming together over shared passions and pints nationwide in 50 states.

news.summary: Englewood, Colorado - On April 10, 2025, XTI Aerospace, Inc. (NASDAQ: XTIA) revealed a new subscale model showcasing the latest aerodynamic configuration. XTI, a leading innovator in xVTOL and powered-lift aircraft solutions, introduced the tradeshow model of the TriFan 600 aircraft during the event.
news.headline: XTI Aerospace unveils TriFan 600 subscale model at Avalon Airshow in Australia, showcasing latest aerodynamic configuration.

news.summary: Ginkgo Bioworks, along with their partners, have secured a substantial $29 million contract from ARPA-H for the purpose of advancing the distributed manufacturing of essential medicines. This initiative involves utilizing wheat germ cell-free expression systems for the development process. The funding was announced on April 10, 2025, in Boston. Ginkgo Bioworks, listed under NYSE as DNA, is at the forefront of establishing a comprehensive platform for cellular innovations.
news.headline: Ginkgo Bioworks and partners receive $29 million from ARPA-H to develop wheat germ system for drug manufacturing.

news.summary: The PXM Champions Awards ceremony takes place annually to honor customers who utilize Akeneo solutions to enhance product experiences and drive growth. The event was held in Chicago on April 10, 2025. Akeneo is a top provider of Product Information Management (PIM) solutions that help companies boost their product experiences.
news.headline: Akeneo honors customers at Unlock 2025 Chicago for enhancing product experiences and driving growth with their solutions.

news.summary: The first FDA-approved acetaminophen gummy pain and fever reducer medicine for children, known as DR GUMI, has recently been launched in Southern California. This offers parents in the region a stress-free alternative to traditional medications. The product aims to provide relief for pediatric pain and fever, addressing the needs of children in a convenient gummy form. This launch took place on April 10, 2025, in Los Angeles.
news.headline: First FDA-approved acetaminophen gummy pain and fever reducer for kids - DR GUMI - launches in Southern California, providing sweet relief.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Rimini Street, Inc. (Nasdaq: RMNI), a worldwide enterprise software support and innovation solutions provider, received accolades at the 19th annual Stevie Awards for Sales & Customer Service and the 2025 Business Intelligence Group AI Excellence Awards. They were honored with a Silver Stevie for Front-Line Customer Service Team of the Year and a Bronze Stevie for Best Customer Interaction. Rimini Street is the top third-party support provider for Oracle, SAP, and VMware software, catering to a large clientele globally.
news.headline: Rimini Street wins awards for customer service and AI innovation at Stevie and AI Excellence Awards.

news.summary: Real Chemistry, based in New York, experienced a significant growth in global revenue in 2024, reaching a total of $665 million. This marked a 12% increase from the previous year, where revenue stood at $596 million in 2023.
news.headline: Real Chemistry's revenue hits $665 million in 2024, up 12% from $596 million in 2023.

news.summary: Senstar Technologies Corporation, a renowned global supplier of physical, video, and access control security products, is set to disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. Traded as NASDAQ: SNT, the corporation is known for delivering comprehensive security solutions. The disclosure will shed light on the company's performance during this period, providing insight into its financial health and strategy going forward. This update is highly anticipated by investors, analysts, and stakeholders eager to assess Senstar's position in the market.
news.headline: Senstar Technologies (NASDAQ: SNT) to report Q4 and Year End 2024 results on April 23, 2025. Leading security provider.

news.summary: ZS recently attained two new Amazon Web Services (AWS) competencies: the AWS Generative AI Competency and the AWS Travel and Hospitality Consulting Competency. This achievement positions ZS as an expert in leveraging AWS technologies for generative artificial intelligence (generative AI) and providing consulting services in the travel and hospitality sector. The AWS Competency Program connects customers with skilled AWS Partners, like ZS, who offer specialized knowledge and technical proficiency. These competencies highlight ZS's capabilities in utilizing AWS solutions and industry best practices.
news.headline: ZS attains 2 new AWS competencies: AWS Generative AI and Travel & Hospitality Consulting. Improves customer connections.

news.summary: Morningmate, based in Seoul, South Korea, has announced the launch of its Global Partner Program. This program provides resellers and solution providers worldwide with the opportunity to utilize AI-driven collaborative technologies.
news.headline: Morningmate launches Global Partner Program in Seoul, offering resellers & solution providers AI-powered tech access.

news.summary: PYK-2101, a product developed by Pykus Therapeutics, Inc., aims to eliminate the need for 'face down positioning' post-retinal surgery, with the goal of enhancing visual and anatomical results. The Company is set to disclose interim study findings in the second quarter of 2025. The headquarters of Pykus is located in Cambridge, Massachusetts, and the announcement was made on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Pykus Therapeutics finishes enrolling trial for PYK-2101 retina sealant, aims to enhance retinal detachment treatment. Interim study results out in Q2 2025.

news.summary: PayPal, based in San Jose, California, has allocated a sum of $10 million to reward its customers who use PayPal checkout. With the opportunity to have 1,000 winners daily, this initiative serves as an added incentive for customers to choose PayPal as their payment method for all their online purchases. The company, listed under NASDAQ as PYPL, has been enhancing the checkout experience to ensure that making payments through PayPal is not only quick and convenient but also comes with additional benefits.
news.headline: PayPal launches $10M sweepstakes, 1,000 winners daily, encouraging customers to use PayPal checkout every time they shop.

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts and Petach Tikva, Israel, CyberArk (NASDAQ: CYBR) revealed the launch of the CyberArk Secure Workload Access Solution. This groundbreaking solution provides unparalleled security for vital non-human identities. With a focus on every aspect of the machine identity lifecycle - including creation, governance, rotation, and renewal - security teams can now enhance visibility and control. This offering represents the most comprehensive protection available for machine identities in the industry.
news.headline: CyberArk introduces Secure Workload Access Solution for non-human identities, ensuring comprehensive protection in all environments.

news.summary: In Redmond, Wash., the latest Nintendo Download features new content for Nintendo Switch: Star Overdrive. Players can engage in an intergalactic third-person action-adventure, solve puzzles, battle tough enemies, and harness the Keytar's powers. The game includes controlling a hypersonic Hoverboard on a remote planet, exploring various alien biomes in a 3D open world. Gamers must utilize creativity to conquer obstacles and enhance their Keytar abilities for success. This week's download offers a unique gaming experience melding strategy and action on Nintendo Switch.
news.headline: Nintendo announces new game release "Star Overdrive", featuring Keytar powers on Switch. Explore alien biomes in 3D open world.

news.summary: NASCAR has recently announced a new collaboration with Recast in an effort to enhance viewer options and boost fan engagement in certain international markets. This partnership is aimed at expanding NASCAR's reach and increasing its audience base. The collaboration was officially launched in Edinburgh, Scotland on April 10, 2025. NASCAR, being the leading motorsport organization in America, is looking to leverage Recast's expertise to cater to a wider audience. This new venture is expected to greatly benefit both NASCAR and Recast, with promising growth prospects in the specified international markets. This strategic move signifies NASCAR's commitment to enhancing its global presence and engaging with fans on a larger scale.
news.headline: NASCAR partners with Recast to expand global reach and fan engagement in select international markets, enhancing viewership options.

news.summary: Appian, a company listed as NASDAQ: APPN, has recently achieved the highest impact level of 5 PA for a full three-year term. This news comes as they also marked a decade of being authorized by FedRAMP for their Appian Cloud services. The milestone was celebrated on April 10, 2025, based in McLean, Virginia. The Appian Government Cloud (AGC) successfully completed the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program, showcasing their commitment to meeting stringent security standards.
news.headline: Appian's AGC achieves FedRAMP High Authorization, with full three-year Impact Level 5 PA, celebrating 10 years of FedRAMP Authorization.

news.summary: In a joint effort with Amazon Web Services, Modus Create has developed a cutting-edge platform geared towards enhancing accuracy, efficiency, and compliance for life science firms. This collaboration aims to provide unparalleled benefits to businesses in this sector. As of April 10, 2025, EVERSANA, a prominent provider of commercial services to the life sciences sector, announced this strategic move. This innovative platform is set to revolutionize operations and offer advanced solutions to companies, setting new industry standards.
news.headline: EVERSANA introduces EVERSANA ORCHESTRATE™ MLR, collaborating with AWS and Modus Create for enhanced efficiency and compliance.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has increased by 0.3% in the past month, reaching a total of 6.8%. This rise is concerning as it indicates a growing number of individuals without jobs. Additionally, it was stated that the government is planning to provide financial aid to over 1,000 struggling businesses in an effort to boost the economy. This aid package is expected to cost approximately $5 million and aims to prevent further layoffs and closures. Experts are hopeful that these measures will help alleviate the current economic challenges and support both businesses and employees during this difficult time.
news.headline: Affirm partners with MoreThanFair for fair lending practices and inclusivity. #collaboration #transparency

news.summary: In a recent announcement, it was stated that eight lucky winners will be awarded scholarships worth $2,500 each to pursue education at a massage school of their choosing. The initiative is being led by Massage Envy, a renowned brand in skin care and the top massage provider in the U.S. via its extensive franchise network. This opportunity is aimed at supporting individuals interested in furthering their knowledge and skills in the field of massage therapy. The winners will have the freedom to select the massage school that best fits their educational needs and aspirations. The announcement was made in Scottsdale, Arizona on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Massage Envy awards $2,500 scholarships to eight winners for massage school, a total of $20,000.
